item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.VLHCNXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 12T Pro China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 12T Pro China

Codename: pearl

Version: OS3.0.3.0.VLHCNXM | 15.0

Size: 7.8 GB

MD5: f1efbaeeee65e1aec7ac8f7523118f92

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Improved system stability and user experience
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
